strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, and React across multiple companies
Recent direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, courses, and authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Vitest not listed; testing experience leans on Jest-era and D-language frameworks
No clear evidence of Kotlin or significant Python production work
response.justification: The role demands a 6+ year full-stack engineer with TypeScript/Node/React, AI-agent exposure, testing discipline, and cloud/container familiarity. The candidate clearly exceeds the experience bar (13+ years), demonstrates the exact primary stack at Optilyz and re:cinq (TypeScript, Node, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK), and uniquely matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP/agentic framework work. Testing rigor is well-evidenced through TDD practice at RIDE and authored test tooling. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin, but these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history (D, Java, C++, Swift). Cloud and container experience is present (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker). Evidence strongly supports a senior IC fit.
